title: No Crop Trampling
description: Prevents you and mobs from trampling over crops
body:
## No Crop Trampling

This mod prevents you and other mobs from trampling over your crops.

You can walk all over your crops, jump on them, fall on them, and even let mobs crawl all over them and you will never need to fix your crop farms ever again!

No need for any enchantment, and the mod is extremely lightweight
